---
title: "607_Project2B_DylanGold"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Codebase #2

### Importing data
For my second dataset, I will clean and analyze https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aungdev/birth-rate-of-countries-world-bank-data?utm_source=chatgpt.com&select=API_SP.DYN.CBRT.IN_DS2_en_csv_v2_5607611.csv. This was picked by Khandker Qaiduzzaman in the 5A discussion posts.
